gems.title: 奥德赛
gems.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
gems.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,
gems.whyWatch: 史诗级归乡之旅，在冒险与神怪之外，更见人性的坚韧与智慧。
gems.whyWatchEn: An epic homecoming that balances mythic adventure with profound human resilience and cunning.
gems.audience: 喜欢古典神话、宏大叙事与深度角色成长的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of classical mythology, grand narratives, and deep character arcs.
